mapper.update: MERGE T_IDM_GROUP AS t USING (SELECT #{d.deptId} AS GroupCode, #{companyCode} AS CompanyCode) AS s ON (t.GroupCode = s.GroupCode AND t.CompanyCode = s.CompanyCode) WHEN MATCHED AND t.SyncSource = 'SAP' THEN UPDATE SET GroupName = #{d.deptName}, UpperGroupCode = #{d.parentCode}, UpdatedTime = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ObjectGUID, CompanyCode, GroupCode, GroupName, UpperGroupCode, GroupStatus, SyncSource, CreatedTime, UpdatedTime) VALUES (NEWID(), #{companyCode}, #{d.deptId}, #{d.deptName}, #{d.parentCode}, '10', 'SAP', GETDATE(), GETDATE());

MERGE T_IDM_USER AS t USING (SELECT #{u.empId} AS EmpNo) AS s ON (t.EmpNo = s.EmpNo) WHEN MATCHED AND t.SyncSource = 'SAP' THEN UPDATE SET UID = COALESCE(t.UID, #{u.empId}), UserName = #{u.empName}, DeptCode = #{u.deptId}, TitleCode = #{u.titleCode}, TitleName = #{u.titleName}, DutyCode = #{u.dutyCode}, DutyName = #{u.dutyName}, Mobile = #{u.cellNo}, Email = #{u.email}, UserStatus = #{mappedStatus}, ObjectCategory = #{u.userType}, UpdatedTime = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ObjectGUID, UIDNumber, UID, EmpNo, UserName, DeptCode, TitleCode, TitleName, DutyCode, DutyName, Mobile, Email, UserStatus, ObjectCategory, CompanyCode, UserRole, SyncSource, CreatedTime, UpdatedTime) VALUES (NEWID(), NEXT VALUE FOR seq_idm_user_uid, #{u.empId}, #{u.empId}, #{u.empName}, #{u.deptId}, #{u.titleCode}, #{u.titleName}, #{u.dutyCode}, #{u.dutyName}, #{u.cellNo}, #{u.email}, #{mappedStatus}, #{u.userType}, #{companyCode}, 'TEAM_MEMBER', 'SAP', GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_hr_sync_log (executed_at, target, received_count, success, message) VALUES (GETDATE(), #{target}, #{receivedCount}, #{success}, #{message})
